overall.description: Gameplay footage from Marvel's Spider-Man: Miles Morales showing the protagonist web-swinging through a snow-covered Manhattan. The character wears a black and red suit with a Santa hat, performing acrobatic aerial traversal between skyscrapers, wall-running up a glass tower, and diving toward the streets below.

agents.ego_description: web-swinging between buildings at medium altitude, navigating through urban canyon

entered.detail: Modern high-rise with reflective blue-tinted windows
Classic red brick building with metal fire escape ladders
City street below with snow on asphalt and parked cars

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with Spider-Man swinging between mid-rise buildings in a snowy urban canyon. The camera follows closely as he navigates between a modern glass tower on the left and a classic brick apartment building on the right, with light traffic visible on the snow-dusted street below.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban park with historic arch monument

events.description: ascends to higher altitude revealing Washington Square Park and arch below

agents.ego_description: swinging at high altitude over snow-covered park with acrobatic flips

entered.detail: Historic white stone triumphal arch standing in the park
Park ground covered in snow with bare trees scattered throughout

segments.scene_description: Ascending above the street level, the scene opens into a wide aerial view of Washington Square Park. The historic stone arch becomes visible on the left while snow-covered trees fill the park below. The camera swings high above the ground with full sky visibility.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense financial district with mixed architecture

agents.ego_description: navigating through dense cluster of skyscrapers with rapid web-swinging maneuvers

entered.detail: Classic wooden water tank on building rooftop
Tall yellow construction crane visible between buildings

segments.scene_description: Continuing through the financial district, the character swings between densely packed skyscrapers of varying architectural styles. A rooftop water tower passes by on the right while construction cranes are visible in the distance, indicating ongoing development in the area.

scene_state.functional_zone: tall glass skyscraper facade with waterfront view

events.description: transitions from aerial swinging to vertical wall-running up glass skyscraper
reaches skyscraper rooftop revealing panoramic harbor and city skyline

agents.ego_description: running vertically up the glass facade of Freedom Tower, then standing on rooftop edge

entered.detail: Very tall modern skyscraper with reflective glass curtain wall
Blue water of the harbor visible between buildings
Wooden dock structures extending into the water

segments.scene_description: The character transitions from swinging to running vertically up the glass facade of a massive skyscraper. Upon reaching the rooftop, the scene opens to a panoramic view of the harbor and distant city skyline. The camera captures the reflective glass surface and the water below before the character dives off the edge.

events.description: dives off skyscraper rooftop accelerating rapidly toward street level
lands briefly on rooftop then immediately launches back into web-swing

agents.ego_description: diving from skyscraper height and swinging through streets before landing on a rooftop

notable_agents.action: white delivery truck driving along the street below

entered.detail: Commercial delivery vehicle on the street below
Industrial air conditioning units on building rooftop

segments.scene_description: Diving from the skyscraper rooftop, the character rapidly descends toward street level, swinging between lower buildings near the waterfront. A white delivery truck is visible on the street below. The character briefly lands on a rooftop with AC units before launching back into the air to continue traversal.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a snowy urban canyon that ascends into a wide aerial panorama before diving back toward the city streets. It begins with Spider-Man swinging between a modern glass tower and a brick apartment building, navigating closely above a snow-dusted road. As the camera climbs higher, the view opens up to reveal the historic stone arch and snow-covered trees of Washington Square Park under a wide sky. The scene then shifts into the dense architecture of the financial district, passing rooftop water towers and distant construction cranes before the character transitions into a vertical run up a massive glass facade. Finally, the perspective expands into a panoramic view of the harbor from the rooftop before the camera plunges in a rapid descent toward the waterfront, passing a white delivery truck and landing briefly among rooftop AC units.
